overview: A full-featured social media platform combining the best of Instagram and Twitter. Users can share photos and text posts, follow friends, explore trending content, and stay connected through a real-time notifications system — all in a clean, modern, mobile-friendly interface.
features: User sign up, login, and profile management with bio and avatar
Home feed showing posts from followed users in reverse chronological order
Photo and text post creation with likes and comments
Follow/unfollow users with follower and following counts
Public user profiles with post grid, viewable without login
Explore page with trending posts and suggested users to follow
Notifications for likes, comments, and new followers — badge in nav and dedicated page
Mobile-responsive layout with hamburger nav on small screens
